fields.name: model
fields.label: Model Alias
fields.description: Grid model alias to evaluate (e.g., private-large, open-large)

fields.name: environment
fields.label: Environment / Domain
fields.description: The task domain to evaluate on

fields.name: agent
fields.label: Coding Agent
fields.description: The agent framework to use for task execution

fields.name: max_concurrency
fields.label: Max Concurrency
fields.description: Number of tasks to run in parallel

fields.name: task_range
fields.label: Task Range
fields.description: Range of task IDs to evaluate (e.g., 0-99 for all tasks, 0-9 for quick test)

fields.name: number_of_trials
fields.label: Number of Trials
fields.description: Number of independent evaluation runs to average over
